---
title: "MN26 Monitoring Data Dictionary"
subtitle: "Variable definitions for `generate_monitoring_report()` output"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
---

Data dictionary for the 5 data frames returned by `generate_monitoring_report()`.

Each row in every data frame represents one participant, uniquely identified by the combination of `pid` + `record_id`. Neither `pid` nor `record_id` is unique on its own — `pid` identifies the REDCap project and `record_id` is unique only within a project.

The MN26 production setup combines **4 REDCap projects** (Kidsights Survey NORC 1–4). Every output data frame includes a `redcap_project_name` column tagging each row with the source REDCap project, so per-project counts and filters are available without re-pulling.

::: {.callout-note}
Variables with a `_norc` suffix use MN26 NORC value codes that differ from the NE25 pipeline.
:::

## `$eligibility_form`

All raw variables from the "Eligibility Form NORC" REDCap instrument, identified via the data dictionary's `form_name` field. In the 4 production REDCap projects this resolves to **15 fields + 1 completion flag** per row.

### Columns

| Column | Source Variable | Type | Description | Values |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|--------|
| `pid` | `pid` (from credentials CSV) | integer | REDCap project ID | Project-specific integer |
| `record_id` | `record_id` | numeric | REDCap record ID | Unique within project |
| `redcap_project_name` | `project` (from credentials CSV) | character | Source REDCap project name | e.g., `"Kidsights Survey NORC 1"` |
| *(dynamic)* | All fields where `form_name == "eligibility_form_norc"` | varies | Raw REDCap fields from the eligibility instrument | As stored in REDCap |
| `eligibility_form_norc_complete` | REDCap instrument status | numeric | Instrument completion flag | 0 = Incomplete, 2 = Complete |

: {.striped .hover}

### Derivation

Fields are selected dynamically from the data dictionary at runtime. Checkbox fields (e.g., race) are expanded to their `field___code` columns. The exact columns depend on the REDCap project configuration.

### Known Fields (production projects)

The following fields belong to `form_name == "eligibility_form_norc"` in the 4 production projects and appear in this output:

- `consent_date_n` — Consent date
- `age_under_6_n` — Any child under 6 in household (yesno)
- `kids_u6_n` — Number of children under 6
- `mn_birth_c1_n` / `mn_birth_c2_n` / `mn_birth_c3_n` — Minnesota birth indicators
- `dob_n` — Child 1 date of birth
- `age_in_days_n` — Child 1 age in days (calculated)
- `parent_guardian_c1_n` — Parent/guardian name for child 1
- `initials_c1_n` — Child 1 initials
- `dob_c2_n` — Child 2 date of birth
- `age_in_days_c2_n` — Child 2 age in days (calculated, if applicable)
- `parent_guardian_c2_n` — Parent/guardian name for child 2
- `initials_c2_n` — Child 2 initials
- `confirm_text` — Confirmation text

::: {.callout-important}
The legacy NE25-era eligibility-checking fields (`eq002`, `eq003`, `mn_eqstate`) live in the *old* `eligibility_form` instrument and are **not** in this output. They remain in the raw REDCap pull for downstream eligibility logic but are intentionally excluded from `$eligibility_form`.
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}

## `$survey_completion`

Module-by-module completion tracking with per-participant denominator.

### Columns

| Column | Source Variable | Type | Description | Values |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|--------|
| `pid` | `pid` | integer | REDCap project ID | Project-specific integer |
| `record_id` | `record_id` | numeric | REDCap record ID | Unique within project |
| `redcap_project_name` | `project` (from credentials CSV) | character | Source REDCap project name | e.g., `"Kidsights Survey NORC 1"` |
| `n_required` | Derived | integer | Per-participant required module count | 7--11 |
| `modules_complete` | Derived | integer | Count of completed modules | 0 to `n_required` |
| `pct_complete` | Derived | numeric | Percentage of modules complete | 0 to 100 |
| `last_module_complete` | Derived | character | Name of last completed instrument | See instrument order below |

: {.striped .hover}

### MN26 Instrument Order (1--25)

| # | Instrument | REDCap `_complete` column | Condition |
|:-:|-----------|--------------------------|-----------|
| 1 | Consent | `consent_doc_complete` | Always |
| 2 | Eligibility | `eligibility_form_norc_complete` | Always |
| 3 | Family Info | `module_2_family_information_complete` | Always |
| 4 | Child Info | `module_3_child_information_complete` | Always |
| 5--12 | Module 6 (child 1) | `module_6_*_complete` | Always (1 age-band per child) |
| 13 | NSCH Questions (child 1) | `nsch_questions_complete` | Only if `age_in_days_n` 365--1065 |
| 14 | Child Info 2 | `child_information_2_954c_complete` | Only if `dob_c2_n` not empty |
| 15--22 | Module 6 (child 2) | `module_6_*_2_complete` | Only if child 2 exists |
| 23 | NSCH Questions (child 2) | `nsch_questions_2_complete` | Only if child 2 + age 365--1065 |
| 24 | Compensation | `module_9_compensation_information_complete` | Always |
| 25 | Follow-up | `module_8_followup_information_complete` | Always |

: {.striped .hover}

Instruments 26--29 (Eligibility Form, Home Learning Environment, Module 7, Birthdate Confirmation) are **ignored** — retained in REDCap but disconnected from branching logic.

### Derivation

- A module is "complete" when its REDCap instrument status = 2
- Module 6 age bands are collapsed: complete if **any** sub-instrument for that child == 2
- `n_required` varies per participant (7--11) based on:
  - Base: 7 (6 always-required + 1 module 6 child 1)
  - +1 if child 1 NSCH-eligible (age 365--1065 days)
  - +2 if child 2 exists (child info 2 + module 6 child 2)
  - +1 if child 2 NSCH-eligible
- `pct_complete = modules_complete / n_required * 100`

{{< pagebreak >}}

## `$child_demographics`

Age, sex, and race/ethnicity for child 1 and child 2.

### Columns

| Column | Source Variable | Type | Description | Values |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|--------|
| `pid` | `pid` | integer | REDCap project ID | Project-specific integer |
| `record_id` | `record_id` | numeric | REDCap record ID | Unique within project |
| `redcap_project_name` | `project` (from credentials CSV) | character | Source REDCap project name | e.g., `"Kidsights Survey NORC 1"` |
| `age_years` | `age_in_days_n` | numeric | Child 1 age in years | 0--5 (continuous) |
| `sex_norc` | `cqr009` | character | Child 1 sex | `"Female"`, `"Male"` |
| `race_norc` | `cqr010b___*` | character | Child 1 race | See mapping below |
| `hisp` | `cqr011` | character | Child 1 Hispanic/Latino ethnicity | `"Hispanic"`, `"non-Hisp."` |
| `raceG_norc` | Derived | character | Child 1 combined race/ethnicity | See mapping below |
| `years_old_c2` | `age_in_days_c2_n` | numeric | Child 2 age in years | 0--5, `NA` if no child 2 |
| `sex_c2_norc` | `cqr009_c2` | character | Child 2 sex | `"Female"`, `"Male"`, `NA` if no child 2 |
| `race_c2_norc` | `cqr010_c2b___*` | character | Child 2 race | Same categories as child 1 |
| `hisp_c2` | `cqr011_c2` | character | Child 2 Hispanic/Latino ethnicity | `"Hispanic"`, `"non-Hisp."` |
| `raceG_c2_norc` | Derived | character | Child 2 combined race/ethnicity | Same categories as child 1 |

: {.striped .hover}

### Variable Mappings

#### Age

`age_years` = `age_in_days_n / 365.25`

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used `age_in_days`; MN26 uses `age_in_days_n` (child 1) and `age_in_days_c2_n` (child 2).
:::

#### Sex

`sex_norc` from `cqr009` (radio). Child 2 `sex_c2_norc` from `cqr009_c2` uses the same codes.

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 1 | Female |
| 0 | Male |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-important}
Codes are **swapped** from NE25 (NE25: 0=Female, 1=Male).
:::

#### Race

`race_norc` from `cqr010b` (checkbox, check all that apply). Child 2 `race_c2_norc` from `cqr010_c2b___*` uses the same codes.

| REDCap Code | Checkbox Field | Label |
|:-----------:|----------------|-------|
| 100 | `cqr010b___100` | American Indian or Alaska Native |
| 101 | `cqr010b___101` | Asian |
| 102 | `cqr010b___102` | Black or African American |
| 103 | `cqr010b___103` | Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander |
| 104 | `cqr010b___104` | White |
| 105 | `cqr010b___105` | Other |

: {.striped .hover}

- If multiple checkboxes selected $\rightarrow$ `"Two or More"`
- If no checkboxes selected $\rightarrow$ `NA`

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used `cqr010___*` with 15 granular categories; MN26 uses `cqr010b___*` with 6 pre-collapsed categories.
:::

#### Ethnicity

`hisp` from `cqr011` (radio). Child 2 `hisp_c2` from `cqr011_c2` uses the same codes.

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 0 | non-Hisp. |
| 1 | Hispanic |

: {.striped .hover}

#### Combined Race/Ethnicity

`raceG_norc` derived from `race_norc` + `hisp`:

- If `hisp == "Hispanic"` $\rightarrow$ `"Hispanic"`
- Otherwise $\rightarrow$ `"{race_norc}, non-Hisp."` (e.g., `"White, non-Hisp."`)

{{< pagebreak >}}

## `$parent_demographics`

Demographics for the primary caregiver (respondent).

### Columns

| Column | Source Variable | Type | Description | Values |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|--------|
| `pid` | `pid` | integer | REDCap project ID | Project-specific integer |
| `record_id` | `record_id` | numeric | REDCap record ID | Unique within project |
| `redcap_project_name` | `project` (from credentials CSV) | character | Source REDCap project name | e.g., `"Kidsights Survey NORC 1"` |
| `age_years` | `cqr003` | numeric | Parent age in years | Continuous |
| `gender` | `mn2` | character | Parent gender | `"Female"`, `"Male"`, `"Non-binary"` |
| `race_ethnicity` | `sq002b___*` + `sq003` | character | Combined race/ethnicity | See mapping below |
| `education` | `cqr004` | character | Education level | See mapping below |
| `marital_status_label_norc` | `cqfa001` | character | Marital status | See mapping below |

: {.striped .hover}

### Variable Mappings

#### Gender

`gender` (`a1_gender_norc`) from `mn2` (radio):

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 0 | Female |
| 1 | Male |
| 97 | Non-binary |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used `cqr002` (binary sex: 0=Female, 1=Male); MN26 uses `mn2` (gender with Non-binary option).
:::

#### Race/Ethnicity

`race_ethnicity` (`a1_raceG_norc`) from `sq002b___*` + `sq003`.

**Race checkboxes** (`sq002b`, check all that apply):

| REDCap Code | Checkbox Field | Label |
|:-----------:|----------------|-------|
| 100 | `sq002b___100` | American Indian or Alaska Native |
| 101 | `sq002b___101` | Asian |
| 102 | `sq002b___102` | Black or African American |
| 103 | `sq002b___103` | Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander |
| 104 | `sq002b___104` | White |
| 105 | `sq002b___105` | Other |

: {.striped .hover}

- If multiple checkboxes selected $\rightarrow$ `"Two or More"`
- If no checkboxes selected $\rightarrow$ `NA`

**Ethnicity** (`sq003`, radio):

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 0 | non-Hisp. |
| 1 | Hispanic |

: {.striped .hover}

**Combined `race_ethnicity`:**

- If Hispanic $\rightarrow$ `"Hispanic"`
- Otherwise $\rightarrow$ `"{race}, non-Hisp."` (e.g., `"White, non-Hisp."`)

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used `sq002___*` with 15 granular categories; MN26 uses `sq002b___*` with 6 pre-collapsed categories.
:::

#### Education

`education` (`educ_a1_norc`) from `cqr004` (radio):

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 0 | 8th grade or less |
| 1 | 9th-12th grade, No diploma |
| 2 | High School Graduate or GED |
| 3 | Vocational/Trade/Business school |
| 4 | Some College, no degree |
| 5 | Associate Degree |
| 6 | Bachelor's Degree |
| 7 | Master's Degree |
| 8 | Doctorate or Professional Degree |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used codes 1--8 with slightly different labels; MN26 uses codes 0--8.
:::

#### Marital Status

`marital_status_label_norc` from `cqfa001` (radio):

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 0 | Married |
| 1 | Not married, but living with a partner |
| 2 | Never Married |
| 3 | Divorced |
| 4 | Separated |
| 5 | Widowed |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-tip}
NE25 used codes 1--6; MN26 uses codes 0--5.
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}

## `$compensation_information`

Gift card and contact information from Module 9.

### Columns

| Column | Source Variable | Type | Description | Values |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|--------|
| `pid` | `pid` | integer | REDCap project ID | Project-specific integer |
| `record_id` | `record_id` | numeric | REDCap record ID | Unique within project |
| `redcap_project_name` | `project` (from credentials CSV) | character | Source REDCap project name | e.g., `"Kidsights Survey NORC 1"` |
| `store_choice_label` | `store_choice` | character | Gift card store choice | See mapping below |
| `q1394` | `q1394` | character | Participant first name | Free text |
| `q1394a` | `q1394a` | character | Participant last name | Free text |
| `email_incentive` | `email_incentive` | character | Participant email address | Free text |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-warning}
This data frame contains **PII** (names and email). Handle according to data governance policies.
:::

### Variable Mappings

#### Store Choice

`store_choice_label` from `store_choice` (dropdown):

| REDCap Code | Label |
|:-----------:|-------|
| 1 | Lowe's |
| 2 | Amazon |
| 3 | Walmart |
| 4 | Target |

: {.striped .hover}
